name: Maria Cantwell
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $2,165,780 for Maria Cantwell in U.S. Senate, WA. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $2,165,780.
